seoDescription: Create a deAPI account and start building with unified multimodal inference APIs.

elements.text: Sign up, issue your first key, and send your first request quickly using OpenAI-compatible API patterns and practical docs.

hero.heading: Create Your deAPI Account
hero.body: Launch fast with one API key, one billing surface, and one model-routing layer across chat, image, speech, and embeddings.

sections.title: Your First Week Plan
sections.body: Move from initial signup to production-ready integration with a staged onboarding path.

cards.title: Create API Keys
cards.description: Generate secure keys and assign ownership across environments.

cards.title: Run Playground Tests
cards.description: Validate prompts and payloads before wiring your app.

cards.title: Ship Initial Feature
cards.description: Launch a narrow use case and expand based on observed results.

sections.title: Scale With Confidence
sections.body: Apply governance and cost controls as your usage grows across teams and products.

cards.title: Pricing Alignment
cards.description: Choose plans that fit early-stage and growth-stage throughput.

cards.title: Model Portfolio
cards.description: Select workload-specific models without integration rewrites.

cards.title: Solution Support
cards.description: Get implementation guidance for enterprise and regulated workflows.

contactPanel.heading: Need help onboarding your team?
contactPanel.body: We can support your first integration and define a staged adoption plan.
contactPanel.responseTime: Onboarding response in one business day
